```shell
  ALLOCATE=$(cat << EOF
  {
  "synchronizer" : $SYNCHRONIZER_ID,
  "onboardingTransactions": $TRANSACTIONS,
  "multiHashSignatures": [
  {
  "format" : "SIGNATURE_FORMAT_CONCAT",
  "signature": "$SIGNATURE",
  "signedBy" : "$PUBLIC_KEY_FINGERPRINT",
  "signingAlgorithmSpec" : "SIGNING_ALGORITHM_SPEC_ED25519"
  }
  ]
  }
  EOF
  )
```
